mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_collection_previews ( id, author_user_id, title, first_image, article_id, collected_count, create_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{authorUserId}, #{title}, #{firstImage}, #{articleId}, #{collectedCount}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, author_user_id, title, first_image, article_id, collected_count, create_time FROM article_collection_previews WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, author_user_id, title, first_image, article_id, collected_count, create_time FROM article_collection_previews WHERE author_user_id = #{authorUserId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT id, author_user_id, title, first_image, article_id, collected_count, create_time FROM article_collection_previews WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
